titleStmt.title: SII 6.699: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 699. (A.R. No. 247 of 1899). ON THE THIRD ROUND PILLAR IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1457 Agunēṁṭi jayasaṁvatsara caitra śu 15 Ādivārānanu .
śrījaganāthani Ājñanu tammumudaliṁgāri kumāruṁḍu kū¨rmumudali . bhairavadvārānanu .
hanumaṁttuni pratiṣṭhacēsi . śiṁhyādri Apparubhaṁḍārānaku . saskāniṭaṁkkālu 50 peṭi Iṁdukaḷaṁ
trānaku hanumaṁtuni bhōgānaku di 1 ki Appālu 2 ki du 1 Iṁduku dalamubiyyaṁ sō 3 minumulu so 1 neI sō . ceraka
ḍaṁpa © . vuppu mā 2 verasu Iṁttavaṭukunnu du 1 vorayākuṁḍa vokhaṭi 1 ki biyyaṁ A 2 kudu . verasu du 1 . valna vecamu
yī dēvaraṁ būjacēsi naṁbārki nīḷu pūlutecci Aṁduku sahāgānu vorayā 1 ki du . Appamu sagānku du . I bhogaṁteci
suvāriki Appamu sagānaku du . verasu duggāṇi vōI ni¨rmālya bikkādammamu lekhkanu Apparu bhaṁḍārānaku Āyaṁcēsukoni
vārū . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālaniyyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syāt dha¨rmmaśśatru[¨r*]na kasyacit . svadattāḥ
paradattā vā nāśayaṁtti haraṁti ca ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.699 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
